tape: Thursday's AI-led rally holds into the close - S&P +0.8%, Nasdaq +1.1%, VIX eased to ~16 as US-Iran risk-off fades; no fresh shock, next catalyst is Monday's hot June CPI print (7/14).

alerts.headline: Fresh insider-buying roundup (Quiver Quantitative) again lists AVO for 7/9, consistent with GlobalHarvest's ongoing buying streak - no new negative news.
Susquehanna trimmed its RIG price target to $7 from $8 but kept a Positive rating, following this week's $1B+ Equinor backlog news.

Baird cut its LRMR price target to $5 from $7; stock still holding gains from Wednesday's director buy after Monday's anaphylaxis safety-signal selloff - not a new sell trigger, but a incremental negative revision to watch.
No fresh catalyst since this week's Guggenheim ($15 PT) and JonesResearch ($11 PT) hikes; stock continuing to grind higher (+~2% today) on that momentum.

movers.note: +~3% today, extending the Equinor $1B backlog contract reaction from 7/8.
+~2% today, continued drift on last week's analyst PT hikes.
Mixed signals: Baird PT cut to $5 vs. ongoing director-buy support; range-bound.
